report_name: SoftBank Partners with OpenAI to Offer AI-Driven Vulnerability Assessment Service to Defend Japan's Critical Infrastructure

identities.name: SoftBank Group
identities.description: A Japanese multinational conglomerate that partnered with OpenAI to launch a new cybersecurity offering called "Patching as a Service" through their joint venture, SB OAI Japan GK.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: An AI research and deployment company that collaborated with SoftBank Group to provide advanced AI models for the "Patching as a Service" cybersecurity solution in Japan.

identities.name: SB OAI Japan GK
identities.description: A joint venture between SoftBank Group and OpenAI that offers the "Patching as a Service" solution to critical infrastructure companies in Japan.

identities.name: Japan's critical infrastructure companies
identities.description: A group of approximately 3,000 companies in Japan, including those managing airports, power grids, and transportation networks, targeted as the initial customers for the "Patching as a Service" offering.
